lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Who are you, and what do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My name is Dazaator, and I have a couple of questions for you.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: I don't know you, therefore I will not answer any questions. Now be gone from here, you're drawing attention.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: As if those clothes you're wearing wouldn't do that already.

sections.title: Trying to go down the nearby ladder into the Rat Pits

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't see the bottom of the ladder. I think I'll leave it be, for now.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Ah, [player name]. Back for more intonation?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I can find Phingspet and Grimesquit?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: They live in the sewers below Varrock.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Please don't say hello from me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I can find Hooknosed Jack?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: He hangs around in a rather unfashionable part of Varrock. He likes a good scrap, does Jack.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I can find Smokin' Joe?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: If the old rascal's lungs haven't given up yet, you should find him in Keldagrim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I might find 'The Face'?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Port Sarim is your best bet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I might find Felkrash?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: The Boss?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: You'll find her in Port Sarim, probably in the Rat Pits there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: She's your boss?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Well, sort of. She's the unofficial leader of the Ratcatchers.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Nobody elected her or anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got it. She's the boss.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about the pits?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Here take this, you might find it useful.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: What do you want to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any pointers for me and my cat?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: You should wear an Amulet of Catspeak. It will allow you to organise tactics with your cat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What would be the best tactic to adopt then?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Well, that depends on your outlook, whether you're ready to risk your cat's life or not and how defensive or aggressive you want your cat to be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will not risk my cat's life.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Well if that's the case then you're left with two choices.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: You can adopt an ultra defensive strategy, which increases your cat's hitpoints and defence but causes it to flee sooner.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Or you can adopt a less defensive strategy, which will allow your cat to stay in the pit for longer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a very defensive strategy

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Just take care of yourself, cat.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a less defensive strategy.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Stay in for as long as you can.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am willing to risk my cat, if it increases my chances of victory.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: In that case you are left with two choices.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: You could go for all out attack which will boost your cat's attack and strength, but weaken it.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Or, go for a less aggressive stance, which will increase your cat's strength and attack to a lesser degree, but carries no defensive penalties.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a very aggressive strategy.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Go berserk!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a less aggressive strategy.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat: 'No guts, no glory!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What benefits does my cat get from training in the pits?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: It depends on what kind of cat you have.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: In the Ardougne pits, your kitten will grow up faster whether it wins or loses.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if it wins then?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: It will gain more experience, it'll be happier, and it'll be fed, too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you show me to the Rat Pits?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: See that ladder there? That's the way in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Good luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you spell your name again?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: J-I-M-M-Y D-A-Z-Z-L-E-R.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ever thought about putting a '1' in it?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Why on Gielinor would I do that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Might add a bit of pizzazz, that's all.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Pizzazz, you say? I'll think about it.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: What's your name and your business here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My name is [player name], and I have a couple of questions for you.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean by no?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: That just isn't the ticket. I don't know you nor I will not answer any questions. Now get gone from here, you'll attract unwanted attention to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: As if those 'clothes' you're wearing wouldn't do that already.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Ah [player name] aren't you just the ticket?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I could find Phingspet and Grimesquit?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: You can find those vile harpies in the sewers of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: ~Jimmy shudders when he thinks of them.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: If you ask me it's too good a place for them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I could find Hooknosed Jack?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: He should be in the roughest area of Varrock knowing him. He likes a good scrap does Jack.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I could find Smokin Joe?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: You won't find him around here. They wouldn't let a filthy old dwarf like him into a civilised town like this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well if he's not here where would I find him?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: If the old rascal's lungs haven't given up yet, you should find him in Keldagrim, the city of Dwarves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I would find 'The Face'?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Old pugly, my oh my but did she ever get her comeuppance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Old pugly?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Pug ugly.

lines.speaker: Bones
lines.text: She's worse than that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: She is?

lines.speaker: Bones
lines.text: Her looks are the stuff of legend. She's so ugly she ...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You guys are really nasty.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Believe me she deserves everything she gets!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did she do?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: I couldn't possibly tell you, but be careful around her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will you please tell me where I could find her?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: She'll be in or around Port Sarim I reckon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I would find Felkrash?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: The Boss?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: You'll find her in Port Sarim, probably in the ratpits.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: She's your boss?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Well sort of, she's the unofficial head of the rat catchers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about the pits?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Here take this, you might find it useful

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Well what do you want to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any pointers for me and my cat?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: You should wear an amulet of catspeak. It will allow you to organise tactics with your cat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What would be the best tactic to adopt then?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Well, that depends on your outlook, whether you're ready to risk your cat's life or not and how defensive or aggressive you want your cat to be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will not risk my cat's life.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Well if that's the case then your are left with two choices.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: You can adopt an ultra defensive strategy, which increases your cat's hitpoints and defence, the drawback to this is that your cat will flee sooner.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Your other option is to adopt a less defensive strategy which will allow your cat to stay in the pit for longer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a very defensive strategy

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Just take care of yourself cat.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a less defensive strategy.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Stay in for as long as you can.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am willing to risk my cat, if it increases my chances of victory.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: In that case you are left with two choices.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: You could go for all out attack which will boost your cat's attack and strength, but weaken it

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: or go for a less aggressive stance which will increase your cat's strength and attack to a lesser degree, but carries no defensive penalties.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a very aggressive strategy

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Go berserk!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a less aggressive strategy.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: In that case you should tell this to your cat, 'No guts, no glory!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What benefits does my cat get from training in the pits?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: It depends on what kind of cat you have.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: In the Ardougne pits your kitten will grow up faster, whether it wins or loses.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if it wins then?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: It will gain more experience and will become happier and will be fed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you show me to the rat pits?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: The pits lie below this very pub.
